passport.label: Passport number
passport.help: Printed on the photo page of your passport. Letters and numbers only.

errors.tooShort: Passport number too short — min 6 characters
errors.tooLong: Passport number too long — max 12 characters
errors.invalidChars: Letters and numbers only — no spaces or symbols

given_name.label: Given name
given_name.help: Exactly as shown on your passport (Latin letters only)

errors.invalidChars: Use the Latin spelling from your passport — no accents

family_name.label: Family name
family_name.help: Exactly as shown on your passport (Latin letters only)

errors.invalidChars: Use the Latin spelling from your passport — no accents

errors.tooEarly: Date of birth seems too far in the past — double check
errors.tooLate: Date of birth cannot be in the future

flight_number.label: Flight or vessel number
flight_number.help: Airline 2-letter code + flight number (e.g. AA1234). For cruises, use the ship's ID.

errors.required: Flight or vessel number is required
errors.invalidFormat: Format: airline code + number (e.g. AA1234). No spaces.

arrival_date.label: Arrival date
arrival_date.help: Format: YYYY-MM-DD — the date you arrive in the Dominican Republic

errors.tooLate: Arrival date seems too far in the future

departure_date.label: Departure date
departure_date.help: Format: YYYY-MM-DD — the date you leave the Dominican Republic. Approximate is OK.

errors.tooEarly: Departure date must be on or after arrival date

accommodation.label: Address or hotel in DR
accommodation.help: Where you will stay. Hotel name and city is enough for tourism.

errors.required: Address in Dominican Republic is required

email.label: Email
email.help: QR code is sent here. Use an email you can check on your phone.
